titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Haiti ( (Munro))

div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Haiti ( Munro )
div.p: 49. The following message has been received by the President from the President of Haiti: [Here follows text of telegram of July 4, printed on page 491.]

The President has replied as follows: [Here follows text of telegram of July 9, printed supra.] Unless you perceive objection thereto you may state to President Vincent that the President learns with pleasure of his desire to contribute to an early settlement of the outstanding problems between the two countries, and that he feels it a matter for mutual satisfaction that the terms of the joint Haitianization program proposed by you to the Haitian Government in accordance with the Department’s telegram No. 47 of July 3 are not only in accord with the recommendations of the Forbes Commission but envisage an even more speedy Haitianization of the Treaty Services.
